CustomField.description: Calculated enrollment close date for status field. Only consider the dates in term if both enrollment start/end date in study offering are empty.
CustomField.formula:
IF( NOT(ISNULL( Enrollment_Close_Date__c )) || NOT(ISNULL (Enrollment_Open_Date__c)), Enrollment_Close_Date__c, IF( ISNULL( Academic_Term__r.Enrollment_Close_Date__c ) && NOT(ISNULL( Academic_Term__r.Enrollment_Open_Date__c)), null, Academic_Term__r.Enrollment_Close_Date__c )
)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculated enrollment close date for status field. Only consider the dates in term if both enrollment start/end date in study offering are empty.
CustomField.label: Enrollment Close Date
